creator: culot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Christer,

Thanks for submitting this update, however I ran into a weird configuration
error while trying to install salt into my tinderbox. Could you please have
a look at the below log?

http://people.freebsd.org/~culot/tinderbox/9.0-FreeBSD/salt-0.12.0.log

Thanks for your help!

Regards,
Frederic
